title: clerodendrum yunnanense var. yunnanense
intro: Clerodendrum yunnanense var. yunnanense, also known as the Yunnan glory bower, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum yunnanense var. yunnanense include treating fever, respiratory issues, and wounds, as well as providing relief from digestive problems and headaches. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are used to treat various ailments, but more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
